subject: English
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the general theme of the poem
Identify simple poetic devices such as personification
Summarize the main ideas of each stanza
Develop basic reading comprehension and vocabulary
Relate the poem to nature and human response

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to the Poem
topics_covered: Theme of the poem: power of nature
teaching_strategy: Discussion about wind and its effect on surroundings
student_activities: Share own experiences of windy weather

lesson_plan.title: Stanza Analysis
topics_covered: Imagery of destruction caused by wind
teaching_strategy: Explain each stanza line by line
student_activities: Write simple meanings of each stanza in notebook
assessment: Oral answers to questions on stanza meaning

lesson_plan.title: Human Response and Moral Lesson
topics_covered: How humans can prepare for challenges
Lesson on building strength and resilience
Connection of poem to real life
teaching_strategy: Discussion on how humans face challenges
Explain symbolism of strong homes and steadfast hearts

lesson_plan.title: Revision and Recap
teaching_strategy: Ask students to summarize in their own words

teacher_tip: Focus on helping students understand the poem’s theme and personification, using simple language and relatable examples from nature.
